summary: Iteration 8 testing completed successfully. Both bug fixes verified working: (1) TipTap WYSIWYG editor now loads existing article content when editing - the useEffect fix properly syncs content from parent component, (2) Multiple category badges display correctly on article cards and article detail pages. All features tested and functional.

issues: Minor: Shows duplicate 'SPONSORED' badge - one from categories array and one from is_sponsored flag. This is a data design consideration, not a code bug.

passed_tests: Homepage loads with multiple category badges on article cards
Ethereum Layer 2 article card shows CRYPTO (primary) and DEFI (secondary) badges
Trezor article card shows CRYPTO (primary) and SPONSORED (secondary) badges
Article detail page (Ethereum) shows CRYPTO and DEFI badges with clickable links
Article detail page (Trezor) shows CRYPTO and SPONSORED badges with clickable links
Category badge links navigate to correct category pages (/category/crypto, /category/defi, /category/sponsored)
TipTap editor loads existing article content when editing (Bitcoin article - 905 chars loaded)
TipTap editor toolbar is fully functional (Bold, Italic, Underline, Headings, Lists, Quote, Link, Undo/Redo)
New article editor starts with empty TipTap editor showing placeholder 'Start writing your article...'
New article editor has empty title and excerpt fields
Admin login works with provided credentials
Admin articles list shows 10 articles with edit buttons
critical_code_review_comments: TipTapEditor.js useEffect fix (lines 79-83) correctly handles async content loading by checking editor.isEmpty before setting content
ArticleCard.js CategoryBadges component properly filters secondary categories by excluding primary category_slug
ArticlePage.js correctly displays both primary category and secondary categories with clickable links
Minor consideration: Articles with is_sponsored=true AND 'sponsored' in categories array will show duplicate Sponsored badges
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 verified two bug fixes: (1) TipTap editor content loading fix - useEffect in TipTapEditor.js syncs content when it loads asynchronously, tested by editing existing article and confirming content appears in editor. (2) Multiple category badges - ArticleCard.js and ArticlePage.js now show all categories from the categories array, not just the primary. Tested on Ethereum (crypto+defi) and Trezor (crypto+sponsored) articles. Note: Articles with both is_sponsored=true AND 'sponsored' in categories will show duplicate Sponsored badges - this is a data design consideration.

tiptap_editor_empty_content.fix_description: Added useEffect that calls editor.commands.setContent(content) when content prop loads asynchronously and editor.isEmpty is true
tiptap_editor_empty_content.verification: Edited Bitcoin article - editor loaded 905 chars of content with headings and paragraphs

multiple_category_badges.fix_description: Added CategoryBadges component that displays primary category and filters secondary categories from categories array
multiple_category_badges.verification: Ethereum article shows CRYPTO+DEFI badges, Trezor article shows CRYPTO+SPONSORED badges on both cards and detail pages
